rationale: Positive Gemini review summary with no requested change.
Key-scoped diagnostics now skip unrelated deprecated override diagnostics; regression test covers diagnostics(scope, key).
Resolution now clears cached migration diagnostics for the key before fresh override/default resolution; regression test covers reused service instances.
Codex automated review container comment; actionable child review comments are tracked separately.
Migration rule validation now rejects duplicate renamed new_key targets; regression test covers fail-fast behavior.
